message:
test(view_adapters): add unit tests for adapt_dashboard adapter (ft-3hbv9)

10 tests covering: health label/style, cost rows, alert rows, rate limit
rows, backpressure panel, quota panel, summary line, empty state,
format_tokens helper, and health_tier_style helper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
